text:
Market today: A cautious mood is capping the market, but Alphabet's new AI chip roadmap offers a potential bright spot for your tech and chip holdings.

Your holdings: SOXL (-46.25%) and SPAL (-51.51%) are leveraged, decaying, and showing deep losses, demanding immediate attention. QQQ (-2.6%), SMH (-12.19%), and QQQI (-3.83%) are also flagged "SELL." Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Closely monitor all "SELL" flagged positions against their stops. Keep an eye on broader market reaction to AI chip developments.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management and stop-loss adherence on your deeply negative and leveraged positions.
plays: Respect stops on QQQ (670), SMH (540), and QQQI (52) to prevent further margin erosion.
Re-evaluate stops for leveraged SOXL (current 136.8, stop 200) and SPAL (current 12.19, stop 21.38); these stops are above current price and need immediate adjustment.
No new buys today - hold and watch, focus on managing current risk.
